urgency_flags: APRIL 24: Illinois SB 3261/SB 3444 committee vote — assess Anthropic and OpenAI BEFORE or immediately AFTER vote
APRIL 27: OpenAI v. Musk trial begins — reassess OpenAI after jury selection if new disclosures emerge
BEFORE APRIL 30: South Sudan UNMISS Security Council vote — reassess South Sudan after vote
APRIL 25: Trump DEI EO federal contractor clause effective — IBM settlement anchor now live

t1_queue.name: Anthropic
t1_queue.why_now: Illinois SB 3261 committee vote April 24. Lobbying spend record ($1.6M Q1). DOD litigation (May 19 oral arguments). Three simultaneous governance signals. Band boundary risk at 80.
t1_queue.expected_delta_direction: mixed — SB 3261 support positive for ACC/BND; DOD litigation and lobbying firm hire negative for INT

t1_queue.name: OpenAI
t1_queue.why_now: Illinois SB 3444 committee vote April 24 (liability shield for mass casualties). Trial jury selection April 27. SB 3444 backing is direct ACC/INT regression signal.
t1_queue.expected_delta_direction: negative — SB 3444 advocacy weakens ACC/A3; trial start adds INT/I5 pressure

t1_queue.name: IBM
t1_queue.why_now: First-time baseline. $17M DOJ-FCA settlement (Apr 10) for 7-year discriminatory employment practices (race/sex targeting in compensation and mentorship). First-ever DOJ FCA enforcement of DEI practices.
t1_queue.expected_delta_direction: negative — settlement establishes hard evidence floor for EQU/E2 and ACC/A3; IBM cooperation/remediation may be partial positive on INT
t1_queue.f500_gen2_flag: Composite 65.5 appears as possible uniform-generation artifact — verify scoring methodology granularity

t1_queue.name: Meta AI
t1_queue.why_now: Employee keylogger/surveillance announcement April 21-22 (new event). Compound: $375M child safety verdict (Mar 24), LA addiction verdict (Mar 25), MA Section 230 ruling. Four negative signals since last assessment.
t1_queue.expected_delta_direction: negative — employee surveillance is EMP regression; child liability verdicts affect EQU/E3 and ACC/A3

t1_queue.name: Palantir AI
t1_queue.why_now: First-time baseline. ImmigrationOS congressional oversight demand (Apr 2026). EFF human rights due diligence investigation. Former employee open letter. Maven AI targeting platform formalized. Multiple concurrent negative signals.
t1_queue.expected_delta_direction: downward pressure — ImmigrationOS false-positive risk and lack of due diligence response suggest sub-20 composite

t1_queue.name: xAI/Grok
t1_queue.why_now: French prosecution escalation April 20 (Musk no-show). CSAM/deepfakes/Holocaust denial investigation expanding. Colorado AI law lawsuit. NAACP Clean Air Act lawsuit ongoing.
t1_queue.expected_delta_direction: floor confirmation — no positive offsets found; composite 2.2 likely confirmed

t1_queue.name: Scale AI
t1_queue.why_now: First-time baseline. Active DOL investigation for FLSA wage theft (since Aug 2024). Two lawsuits. Extends to HR partners. $14B+ company with structural labor exploitation in AI training pipeline.
t1_queue.expected_delta_direction: negative for first-time baseline — DOL investigation anchors EMP/E1 floor

t1_queue.name: Waymo
t1_queue.why_now: First-time baseline. Dual NHTSA/NTSB investigations (school bus pattern, child strike). Software recall (Dec 2025). DeepMind safety framework update (Apr 17) is positive signal in same corporate family.
t1_queue.expected_delta_direction: mixed — safety recall (positive ACT) vs. active dual investigations and child-strike incident (negative AWR/ACC)

t1_queue.name: UnitedHealth Group
t1_queue.why_now: Q1 2026 earnings (Apr 21): beats estimates, raises guidance. DOJ criminal probe persists with no new disclosure. MCR favorable. HOLD partially resolved.
t1_queue.expected_delta_direction: slight positive (+1.5 to +2.5) — earnings/guidance INT signal vs. DOJ probe silence

t1_queue.name: United States
t1_queue.why_now: DEI EO federal contractor clause effective April 25. Historic ICE detention levels. Third-country deportation legal challenges. DOL leadership vacancy (enforcement gap). Multiple structural policy changes in 14-day window.
t1_queue.expected_delta_direction: negative — DEI EO and immigration enforcement posture are structural EQU regressions

t1_queue.name: Sudan
t1_queue.why_now: Year 4 anniversary documentation confirms ongoing floor. Review for any sub-dimension changes.

t1_queue.name: South Sudan
t1_queue.why_now: UNMISS mandate expires April 30 — Security Council vote imminent. Assess AFTER vote outcome.
t1_queue.expected_delta_direction: conditional — renewal with strong mandate neutral; reduced mandate or non-renewal negative for BND

t1_queue.name: Israel
t1_queue.why_now: EU trade suspension pressure (Apr 21). NGO deregistration (37 orgs). Flotilla at sea. OHCHR report confirms surge in human rights violations.
t1_queue.expected_delta_direction: negative — NGO deregistration and aid blockade continuation are material ACC regressions

t1_queue.name: Amazon
t1_queue.why_now: Worker death (Apr 6) + NLRB bargaining order (Apr 3) both within 14-day window. Composite 21.6 near band boundary at 20.
t1_queue.expected_delta_direction: negative — worker death response and NLRB order are EMP/BND floor events; risk of crossing to critical band

t1_queue.name: Democratic Republic of Congo
t1_queue.why_now: Ceasefire signed Apr 18 but immediately violated. M23 immunity demand blocks ACC progress.
t1_queue.expected_delta_direction: neutral — ceasefire mechanism (positive) offset by immediate violation and immunity demand (negative)
